title: Front Office Manager - Thomas Cook India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Thomas Cook India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Thomas Cook India in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Thomas Cook India:
Thomas Cook India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Thomas Cook India!
